title: Cuneiform Tablet #0498: Old Babylonian Inventory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a inventory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Inventory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records inventory matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
